message.content: ```plantuml @startuml title PB-158 UC8 SQD: Get campaigns customer is eligible for actor "Next Customer" as User participant "P&O\n(Core Next)" as PnO database "P&O DB" as DB participant "Core Bradesco" as Core box "Next Platform" #LightGray participant PnO database DB end box note right of User Endpoint: GET /campaigns Current implementation: Currently only called by system management, returns a list of all campaigns with the option to specify: • NAME • PARTNER_ID • OFFER_ID Required implementation: Either through extension of existing API or new, enable the user to call the endpoint. When a user calls the endpoint return a list of campaigns that that the user is eligible for. As part of the request, include an optional field for whether or not to return the offer logo. As part of the CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL response include: • Campaign logo version number • Campaign logo (optional) ENSURE BACKWARDS COMPATIBILITY IS MAINTAINED end note note over PnO, Core Abstract: This use cases describes the changes being made to an existing endpoint. The endpoint will be modified so that it can be called by the user and will return a list of campaigns that the customer is eligible for. A campaign logo version number will be returned, as well as a campaign logo image (if requested). end note User -> PnO: 1 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO}) activate PnO frame "filter on {NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}" as FilterFrame { PnO -> DB: 2 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO}) activate DB note right of DB Note: Read P&O tables: • ELLIGIBLE_USER • CAMPAIGN end note DB -> DB: 3 Read campaigns user is eligible for deactivate DB DB --> PnO: 4 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL) } alt "if user has been or is eligible for at least one campaign" PnO --> User: 5 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL) else "if user is not eligible for any active campaigns" PnO --> User: 6 Return error (MESSAGE) end deactivate PnO @enduml ```
